query:
SELECT pr.id, pr.gestanteId, g.nome, pr.dataParto, pr.tipoParto, pr.medicoId, pr.observacoes, pr.createdAt, pr.updatedAt 
FROM partosRealizados pr 
LEFT JOIN gestantes g ON pr.gestanteId = g.id
WHERE pr.gestanteId IN (330021, 330022) 
ORDER BY pr.updatedAt DESC;
